data.title: Bybit will delist PROSUSDT and VIDTUSDT perpetual contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the official announcement, Bybit announced that it will delist VIDTUSDT perpetual contract and PROSUSDT perpetual contract at 3:00 UTC time on April 16, 2025.

data.title: Binance: Technical failure of ZEC application using Ledger caused withdrawal problems, and we are exploring temporary solutions
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Binance Customer Support posted on the X platform: "We have noticed that some users have encountered problems when withdrawing ZEC assets from their Binance accounts. The problem is due to a technical failure when we used Ledger's ZEC application, which temporarily prevented some funds from being transferred out. At present, all funds are still safely stored in cold wallets, and user assets are safe (SAFU). We are working closely with the Ledger team to actively promote the repair of the problem, and we are very grateful for their support. At present, they have made the release of the relevant version a priority and are expected to complete the update before April 17, when we will gradually restore the withdrawal function of ZEC. At the same time, we are also actively exploring temporary solutions to minimize the impact of this problem on users."

data.title: Bitcoin Price Surge Boosts Strategy's Holdings Profit
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Bitcoin's recent price increase briefly surpassed $86,000 and is currently valued at $84,531. This surge has led to Strategy's (formerly MicroStrategy) Bitcoin holdings profit rising to $9.01 billion.

As of April 6, 2025, Strategy disclosed that it holds 528,185 Bitcoins, with a total purchase cost of approximately $35.63 billion, averaging $67,458 per Bitcoin.

data.title: Federal Reserve's May Rate Decision Probabilities Analyzed
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from CME's "FedWatch" tool indicates a 39.8% probability of a 25 basis point rate cut by the Federal Reserve in May, while the likelihood of maintaining the current rate stands at 60.2%.

data.title: CMC Altcoin Seasonal Index Hits 18, Showing Market Still Dominated by Bitcoin
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News CMC Altcoin Season Index hit 18, indicating that the market has recovered slightly, but it is still a sharp drop from the March average of 32 points and the February average of 43 points, indicating that the market is still dominated by Bitcoin.
The CMC Altcoin Season Index is a tool that helps determine whether the market is in the Altcoin Season or the Bitcoin Season by tracking the performance of the top 100 cryptocurrencies over the past 90 days. When 75% or more of the Altcoins outperform Bitcoin, the market is considered to be in the Altcoin Season.

data.description:
Trump's tariff exemptions for tech products ease market fears; impact on crypto noted.
source: https://coincu.com/331882-trump-tech-tariff-exemptions-market-impact

data.title: Tokenization platform Progmat completes Pre-A round of financing, and the holdings of 4 institutions including Mitsubishi UFJ and Mizuho Bank are diluted
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group (MUFG) has reduced its stake in tokenization platform Progmat from 49% to 42%. It is reported that the reason for the reduction is that Progmat has completed the Pre-A round of financing at the beginning of this week and introduced three new investors, including Nochun Trust and Banking, Aozora Bank and real estate company Kenedix. The specific amount of this round of financing has not been disclosed. It is reported that the completion of the new round of financing has also led to the dilution of the equity of other shareholders of Progmat, including Sumitomo Mitsui Banking Corporation, Mizuho Bank and Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Bank. They previously held 7.5% of the shares respectively, and now the shareholding ratio is slightly less than 6.5%. 
Previous news, Progmat is currently one of the two major licensed blockchain networks used in Japan to issue digital securities. Its platform will issue yen stablecoins on public blockchains such as Ethereum, and Mitsubishi UFJ has also discussed the issuance of global stablecoins with many institutions. Its Mitsubishi UFJ Trust Bank plans to cooperate with Binance Japan to launch a new stablecoin. (LedgerInsights)

data.title: A whale bought 4224.5 ETH at an average price of $1619 in the past 5 hours in a downward trend
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to @ai_9684xtpa monitoring, in the past 5 hours, a whale bought 4224.5 ETH at an average price of US$1,619 in a downward trend, worth US$6.84 million. The tokens were then transferred to the address 0x3F6...B4aF9, which currently holds 14,001 ETH with a total value of US$22.6 million.

data.title: Opinion: Rising global liquidity may push BTC to $130,000-140,000 by mid-summer
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Bill Barhydt, founder and CEO of crypto asset management company Abra Global, said that based on macroeconomic analysis and rising global liquidity, Bitcoin is expected to trade between $130,000 and $140,000 by mid-summer.
Bill Barhydt explained: "Bitcoin is a leveraged bet on technology stocks, all of which are moving in a positive direction, and altcoins will become leveraged bets on Bitcoin, which is exactly the same as technology stocks in the liquidity-driven bull market cycle. L1 assets such as SOL, SUI and APT have also gained high Beta value opportunities." However, Bill Barhydt is skeptical of Meme coins and warns investors to be cautious. (Finbold)

data.title: Mechanism Capital Partner Andrew Kang Increases Bitcoin Holdings to $200 Million
data.description: According to Odaily, Mechanism Capital partner Andrew Kang has significantly increased his Bitcoin holdings to $200 million. This move, made earlier today, has resulted in an estimated profit of approximately $6.8 million.
